title: 4pcs Sealant Nozzles, Silicone Tube Nozzles, Flexible Caulk Nozzle Tip Tool, 360 Degree Glass Glue Sewing Tool, Glue Caulk Nozzles Black, Bent Nozzle
features: Package: This set includes four caulking flexible caulking nozzles, providing practical household tools for a variety of applications. Ideal for installation projects, daily maintenance, and repairing gaps and cracks in tiles, walls, and floors.

360° Flexibility: The glue caulking nozzles have a unique 360° bending ability, making it easy to get into tight corners and hard-to-reach areas. They can bend and rotate to ensure thorough caulking at all angles and corners.
Construction: The caulking nozzles are made of premium materials, which are strong and crack-resistant, and can withstand regular use without breaking, ensuring reliable performance.

User-Friendly Design: The caulking nozzles are designed for easy use. Simply screw them onto the glue hose to easily access challenging areas. Their non-stick brush and tight connection provide a worry-free caulking experience.

Applicable: Suitable for a variety of applications, including bathroom installations, water tanks, showers, and other area gaps that require precision. A versatile tool for professionals and non-professionals.
description: QERUTK - Caulk Nozzles - 4pcs - 360 Degree Foldable. Achieve precise and efficient gap filling with these Caulk Nozzles. Features: 1. Flexible and Bendable: These caulk nozzles can be bent up to 360 degrees, allowing easy access to corners and hard-to-reach areas. 2. Material: Made from high-strength ABS, these nozzles are built to last and can withstand regular use without breaking. 3. Easy to Use: Simply screw the nozzles onto the glue tube for instant access to challenging spaces. No complicated setups required. 4. Wide Application: Suitable for a variety of tasks, such as sealing corners, bathrooms, water tanks, showers, and more. Specification: Material: ABS Color: Black Size: About 12 x 2 cm / 4.72 x 0.79 inches Package List: 4 x Flexible Caulking Nozzles
